channel.title: Networking on Incredible Technology made Incredibly Simple
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on Incredible Technology made Incredibly Simple

item.title: Configure Wireguard on UniFi USG
item.author: info@damianflynn.com (Damian Flynn)
item.description: Install the Wireguard Package SSH directly to your USG, and run the following commands: 1 2 3 curl -L https://github.com/Lochnair/vyatta-wireguard/releases/download/0.0.20190123/wireguard-ugw3-0.0.20190702-1.deb -o /tmp/wireguard.deb dpkg -i /tmp/wireguard.deb Create the Tunnel Secrets To keep stuff private, we will encrypt the traffic using a long password, known as a ‘Key’. To make sure this is unique, we will use a tool provided by Wireguard to make a random key for us.
